messages.content: You are a temporal-statistical intent planner for NL2Vis. Given a user query and dataset schema, output only valid JSON matching the intent schema. Do not invent unsupported fields or plot unanswerable requests.

Dataset title: ASEAN GDP current USD
Domain: economy
Language: en
Query: Show the trend of gdp current usd in Indonesia over time.

Schema fields:
name=country_code | type=nominal | role=id | unit=
name=country | type=nominal | role=dimension | unit=
name=year | type=temporal | role=time | unit=
name=gdp_current_usd | type=quantitative | role=measure | unit=current US$

Infer the temporal-statistical visualization intent.
